narration_script: In a stunning turn of events, the attack that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei happened in the middle of the morning, catching the regime off guard. This wasn't a random strike; it was the result of months of planning. President Trump noted that Khamenei was unable to avoid our intelligence and highly sophisticated tracking systems, which allowed the US and Israel to pinpoint his exact location. By monitoring the movements of bodyguards and officials, intelligence agencies were able to build up a pattern of life to predict and understand activity, waiting for that perfect moment of vulnerability. There was a clear division of labor during the mission, with Israel focusing on strikes to hit leadership targets while the US handled military objectives. When the window of opportunity opened, Israeli jets launched a massive assault. Reports indicate that they used 30 bombs to attack the compound around 09:40 local time, aiming for an underground bunker. The strike was devastating. Three senior Iranian defence officials have been confirmed dead by Iran, including the Defence Council secretary and the IRGC commander. While this is a massive blow, the future remains uncertain. Iran had been prepared for this possibility though, with reports that the plans for succession had already been put in place for its top leadership.

key_points.label: Morning Strike Timing
key_points.excerpt: The attack that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei came not in the middle of the night, as might have been expected, but in the middle of the morning.
key_points.script_anchor: attack that killed Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei happened in the middle of the morning

key_points.label: Sophisticated Tracking Systems
key_points.excerpt: He was unable to avoid our intelligence and highly sophisticated tracking systems.
key_points.script_anchor: unable to avoid our intelligence and highly sophisticated tracking systems

key_points.label: Pattern of Life Analysis
key_points.excerpt: Over the long term, this can help build up a "pattern of life" to predict and understand activity as well as search for moments of vulnerability.
key_points.script_anchor: build up a pattern of life to predict and understand activity

key_points.label: US-Israeli Division of Labor
key_points.excerpt: The signs are that there is a division of labour with Israel focusing on strikes to hit leadership targets and the US more on military targets.
key_points.script_anchor: division of labor during the mission, with Israel focusing on strikes to hit leadership targets

key_points.label: Massive Compound Bombardment
key_points.excerpt: When the decision was taken, Israeli jets are reported to have used 30 bombs to attack the compound around 09:40 local time.
key_points.script_anchor: used 30 bombs to attack the compound around 09:40 local time

key_points.label: Senior Officials Confirmed Dead
key_points.excerpt: Three senior Iranian defence officials have been confirmed dead by Iran, including Defence Council secretary Ali Shamkhani, Defence Minister Brig Gen Aziz Nasirzadeh and IRGC commander Gen Mohammad Pakpour.
key_points.script_anchor: Three senior Iranian defence officials have been confirmed dead by Iran

key_points.label: Iranian Succession Plans
key_points.excerpt: Iran had been prepared for this possibility though, with reports that the plans for succession for not just Khamenei, but also an array of senior officials
key_points.script_anchor: Iran had been prepared for this possibility though, with reports that the plans for succession
